text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Inari, Inari! You gotta hear this! I did<n>something
amazing today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, what's the hubbub? Take a<n>breath.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it. Today, I ate lunch<n>together with
Teio!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Get this—I had one more bowl of rice<n>than she
did! Amazing, right?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow, big props to you! That's some real<n>spirit ya
got there, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Really? You think I did good?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah—ya gotta eat well to run well,<n>that's for
sure. And you can eat with the<n>best of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... eheheh! Hehehe! Go on, Inari,<n>say even
more cool stuff about me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, look at the smirk on your mug.<n>Y'know I
can't refuse a face like that.
